commands.description: show a workflow task execution timeline
start or resume a workflow participant run
launch governed triage for one task
audit bindings for missing/inconsistent project scope
apply or inspect managed runtime resources

apply a managed resource plan then disable stale (missing-source) resources. Default source-deletion policy is disable (disable-only); archive/purge must be selected explicitly and are unsupported/non-mutating in v1 unless separately implemented. No delete/purge happens by omission.
send an input or active-run outbound message
render a session replay or capture
poll a job run until terminal
manage the ACP HTTP server and Discord gateway process
